index.heroSub: Mudaber Group is an independent music and technology ecosystem. Mudaber Art gets your music onto every major platform, Mudaber Ghost delivers world-class production on demand, and Mudaber Tech builds the infrastructure that scales it all â€” one hub, from your first track to the global stage.
index.ecoArtDesc: The ultimate platform for global music distribution and publishing. Release your tracks on 200+ platforms including Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, SoundCloud, and Beatport, keep 100% of your rights, and track your royalties in real-time.
index.ctaDesc: Join independent artists who trust Mudaber to distribute their music, protect their rights, and grow their careers globally.

testimonials.name: ALEX V.
testimonials.quote: Mudaber changed everything. I used to worry about distribution and splits; now I just make music and they handle the rest.

testimonials.name: DJ KRYPT
testimonials.quote: The ghost production quality is insane. I needed a festival banger quickly, and Mudaber Ghost delivered a track that hit 1M streams.

testimonials.quote: Their tech infrastructure is the backbone of our label. Real-time analytics and instant payouts make running a label effortless.

about.heroSub: Empowering the independent music scene since 2015. We are Mudaber.
about.visionDesc:
Mudaber was founded on a simple principle: artists should have the power of a major label without giving up their rights or creative control.

Started in London by Jamal Belal, we have grown into a massive ecosystem encompassing distribution (Mudaber Art), ghost production (Mudaber Ghost), and technological innovations (Mudaber Tech). We are not just participating in the music industry; we are rebuilding its infrastructure.

coreValues.title: Artist First
coreValues.desc: We never take your rights. You keep 100% of your masters and publishing.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.desc: We build the tech that major labels use, and give it to independents.

coreValues.title: Global Reach
coreValues.desc: Music has no borders. We distribute to over 200 platforms worldwide.

coreValues.title: Discretion
coreValues.desc: Our ghost production services are strictly confidential and exclusive.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.desc: Mudaber was founded in London with a mission to decentralize music distribution.

timeline.title: Mudaber Ghost
timeline.desc: Launched our premium ghost production marketplace, connecting top-tier producers with DJs.

timeline.title: Global Expansion
timeline.desc: Opened offices in Berlin and Dubai, expanding our distribution network to 200+ platforms.

timeline.title: The Tech Revolution
timeline.desc: Introduced AI-driven analytics and smart-contract royalty splits via Mudaber Tech.

ecosystem.heroSub: Three pillars designed for modern creators.

contact.heroSub: Whether you're an artist ready to distribute or a label looking for tech solutions, our team is ready to help.
contact.infoDesc: Mudaber operates globally with a remote-first team, but our official headquarters are located in London, UK.
